segments.content: hi everyone this is Fad Miraza and I welcome you to the channel. Orpheus is a figure from ancient Greek mythology. Orpheus was a musician, poet, and a prophet who was known for his extraordinary musical talents. According to a myth, Orpheus was the son of Apollo and Calipi one of the muses. That is probably why they have named their model as Orpheus because what Orpheus is trying to do is trying to mimic a human level sound. If you have been following my channel for some time, you know that I cover lot of TDS or text-to-speech models where we give some text prompt and the model generates an audio. So far, we have only seen select few models which have produced a real quality human level voice and probably CSM is one of those. That is where it seems the next frontier of these models would be. This new model or 3 billion fine-tuned version is trying to help out in this video, we are going to install it locally and then we will see how it works. This model has been designed for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation and it is based on llama architecture. This model has been fine-tuned to deliver human level speech synthesis that achieves exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance.

Orpheus is a figure from ancient Greek mythology. He was a musician, poet and prophet who was known for his extraordinary musical talents. According to a myth, Orpheus was the son of Apollo and one of the muses, Calipi. The makers of this text-to-speech model may have named it Orpheus because it is trying to mimic human level sound. This new model is designed for high quality empathetic text-to-speech generation and achieves exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance.

orpheus is a new model that has been fine-tuned for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation. It is based on llama architecture and designed to deliver human level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. The model can clone voices without prior fine-tuning, control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text, and has low latency for real-time applications. In this video, the presenter will install it locally and demonstrate how it works.

In this video, we will install locally the new model 'Orpheus' for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation. The model has been designed to deliver human level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. To get started, create a virtual environment and install some audio libraries such as torch, torch audio, transformers, etc. Clone the repo of Orpheus and log into Hugging Face to download the model. The prerequisites include having a free read token from Hugging Face website.

The discussion is about a new model called Orpheus, which is a 3 billion fine-tuned version designed for high-quality, empathetic text-to-speech generation. It aims to deliver human-level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. The model can clone voices without prior fine-tuning and control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text. It has low latency (sub 200 millisecond streaming latency for real-time applications).

Orpheus is a figure from ancient Greek mythology. He was a musician, poet and prophet who was known for his extraordinary musical talents. According to a myth, Orpheus was the son of Apollo and one of the muses, Calipi. The makers of this text-to-speech model may have named it Orpheus because it is trying to mimic human level sound. orpheus is a new model that has been fine-tuned for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation. It is based on llama architecture and designed to deliver human level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. In this video, we will install locally the new model 'Orpheus' for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation. The prerequisites include having a free read token from Hugging Face website.

The discussion is about a new model called Orpheus, which is a 3 billion fine-tuned version designed for high-quality, empathetic text-to-speech generation. It aims to deliver human-level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. The model can clone voices without prior fine-tuning and control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text. It has low latency (sub 200 millisecond streaming latency for real-time applications).

segments.content: hi everyone this is Fad Miraza and I welcome you to the channel. Orpheus is a figure from ancient Greek mythology. Orpheus was a musician, poet, and a prophet who was known for his extraordinary musical talents. According to a myth, Orpheus was the son of Apollo and Calipi one of the muses. That is probably why they have named their model as Orpheus because what Orpheus is trying to do is trying to mimic a human level sound. If you have been following my channel for some time, you know that I cover lot of TDS or text-to-speech models where we give some text prompt and the model generates an audio. So far, we have only seen select few models which have produced a real quality human level voice and probably CSM is one of those. That is where it seems the next frontier of these models would be. This new model or 3 billion fine-tuned version is trying to help out in this video, we are going to install it locally and then we will see how it works. This model has been designed for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation and it is based on llama architecture. This model has been fine-tuned to deliver human level speech synthesis that achieves exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance.

Orpheus is a figure from ancient Greek mythology. He was a musician, poet and prophet who was known for his extraordinary musical talents. According to a myth, Orpheus was the son of Apollo and one of the muses, Calipi. The makers of this text-to-speech model may have named it Orpheus because it is trying to mimic human level sound. This new model is designed for high quality empathetic text-to-speech generation and achieves exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance.

orpheus is a new model that has been fine-tuned for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation. It is based on llama architecture and designed to deliver human level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. The model can clone voices without prior fine-tuning, control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text, and has low latency for real-time applications. In this video, the presenter will install it locally and demonstrate how it works.

In this video, we will install locally the new model 'Orpheus' for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation. The model has been designed to deliver human level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. To get started, create a virtual environment and install some audio libraries such as torch, torch audio, transformers, etc. Clone the repo of Orpheus and log into Hugging Face to download the model. The prerequisites include having a free read token from Hugging Face website.

The discussion is about a new model called Orpheus, which is a 3 billion fine-tuned version designed for high-quality, empathetic text-to-speech generation. It aims to deliver human-level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. The model can clone voices without prior fine-tuning and control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text. It has low latency (sub 200 millisecond streaming latency for real-time applications).
